title: Colorful Ghasts [Happy Ghast]
description: Colorful Ghasts lets you tint vanilla Happy Ghasts with any dye, blending colors on the 2nd application to create smooth, averaged hues. Right-click with a Wet Sponge to clear the tint.
body:
# Colorful Ghasts

Dye your Happy Ghasts!
This NeoForge mod lets you tint vanilla Happy Ghasts with any dye and blend colors on subsequent applications for soft, custom hues. Wash a ghast with a Wet Sponge to clear the tint and start over.

## Gameplay

🎨 Right–click a Happy Ghast with any vanilla dye to apply a tint.

➕ Up to (max dyes value in config) dyes per ghast. The 2nd dye blend with the existing color using a per-channel ARGB average.

🧽 Wet Sponge removes the tint.

🌈 Supports all vanilla dye colors (Black, Blue, Brown, Cyan, Green, Light Blue, Light Gray, Lime, Magenta, Orange, Pink, Purple, Red, White, Yellow).

💾 Per-entity persistence: the tint is saved and synced to clients when players start tracking the ghast.

### What it doesn’t change

🪶 Lightweight & cosmetic only — no AI, stats, damage, spawning, or loot changes.

### Requirements & Compatibility

🔄 Sides: Client and Server required (render happens on the client).

🧩 Works in singleplayer and multiplayer; generally compatible with content mods since behavior isn’t modified.

## How to use

🧴 Hold a dye and right–click a Happy Ghast.

✌️ Apply up to (max dyes value in config) dyes total; later dyes blend with the current tint.

🧽 Use a Wet Sponge to clear the color.

📂 Config file: colorfulghasts.json/toml (u can set maximum amout dyes per ghast)

## License & Links
